text.title: Spec-Driven Debugging Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.code: { "bug_id": "BUG-2026-05-001", "symptom": "POST /api/orders returns 200 OK with empty body when total exceeds 9999", "expected": "POST /api/orders returns 422 + problem+json with validation detail", "repro_loc": 12, "bisect_commit": "a3f1c8d", "fix_commit": "b4e2d9f", "regression_test_path": "tests/test_orders_validation.py::test_total_over_max", "incident_link": "https://github.com/x/y/issues/142" }

example.note: symptom + expected empty (rule name-the-symptom-precisely); repro_loc > 20 (forbidden); fix_commit + regression_test_path empty.

list.pattern: Bug returns 3 sprints later under a different reviewer.
Repro takes 200 lines; only 3 lines actually matter.
3 hours spent speculating which commit introduced the regression.
